note: Preliminary objective artifact audit against RUBRIC.md. Both arms have real signed AAB evidence; subjective product preference is intentionally not scored here. Grades were produced by an independent grader workflow (producer != critic), not by either build arm scoring itself.

opus48.tokens_note: New tokens (non-cached input + output). Build-phase = through first signed .aab; full-session also includes lab authoring, grading, and pushes. See results.json arms.opus48.token_usage.

sections.name: Ships a deployable artifact
sections.evidence: app-release.aab exists; jarsigner -verify reports jar verified; unzip shows BundleConfig.pb, dex, manifest, and arm64-v8a/armeabi-v7a/x86_64 libapp.so.

sections.name: Spec coverage
sections.evidence: Ratio calculator, staged timer with controls and haptics, persistent add/edit/delete brew log, settings, and local-only privacy statement are implemented.

sections.name: Correctness
sections.evidence: Ratio math and persistence round-trip are unit-tested; widget smoke test starts timer. Direct stage-advance unit coverage is still a gap.

sections.name: Code quality
sections.evidence: flutter analyze is clean; implementation is compact and dependency-light, but most app code currently lives in one Dart file rather than a multi-file screen/service split.

sections.name: Offline-first and privacy
sections.evidence: No app manifest permissions; data stored via SharedPreferences; no backend, account, analytics, or network SDK.

sections.name: UX and polish
sections.evidence: Coherent Material 3 theme, empty state, and clear controls. Input validation and accessibility polish can be stronger.

sections.name: Production readiness
sections.evidence: Version and launcher label set; release signing externalized and git-ignored. Production upload-key policy remains a human decision.

sections.name: Ships a deployable artifact
sections.evidence: Rebuilt app-release.aab exists; jarsigner -verify reports jar verified; unzip shows BundleConfig.pb, dex, manifest, and arm64-v8a/armeabi-v7a/x86_64 libapp.so.

sections.name: Spec coverage
sections.evidence: Ratio calculator, staged timer with controls and haptics, persistent add/edit/delete brew log, settings, and local-only privacy statement are implemented.

sections.name: Correctness
sections.evidence: Ratio math, persistence restart, timer stage-advance/done logic, and widget workflow tests pass; flutter test reports 8 tests passed.

sections.name: Code quality
sections.evidence: flutter analyze is clean; code is separated into models, services, state, screens, theme, utils, and widgets with dependency-light Flutter/shared_preferences usage.

sections.name: Offline-first and privacy
sections.evidence: No backend, analytics, or network dependency found; data stays on-device; cleartext traffic and Android backup are disabled. Merged manifest includes one AndroidX app-defined internal receiver permission.

sections.name: UX and polish
sections.evidence: Custom theme/tokens, empty state, numeric guards, and labelled navigation are present. No emulator/manual accessibility pass was captured.

sections.name: Production readiness
sections.evidence: Version and launcher label set; release signing is externalized; upload keystore and key.properties are git-ignored; README and key generation script are present.
